result.markdown: --- title: "Week 3: Time series decomposition" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Transforming data to remove some sources of variation * Decomposing a time series into trend-cycle, seasonal and remainder components * Seasonal adjustment ## Pre-class activities Read [Chapter 3 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/decomposition.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Monday lecture Download slides ## Tuesday workshop * [Week 3 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049179) ## Exercises (on your own or in tutorial) * Complete Exercises 1-5, 9-10 from [Section 3.7 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/decomposition-exercises.html). ## Assignments * [Assignment 1](../assignments/A1.qmd) is due on Monday 24 August.
